urdu transliteration text:
Sakina Dasht Me Ayi Hai Dhundh Ne Tujhko
Nishaan Galon Ke Lahu Ashk Dikhane Tujhko
english translation text:
Sakina Has Come Into The Desert To Find You
And Show You The Marks On Her Cheeks And Tears Of Blood

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhe Sada Do Bikharne Se Bachalo Baba
Sitam Laeeno Ke Ayi Hun Batane Tujhko
english translation text:
Call Out To Me Save Me From Destruction
I Have Come To Show You The Atrocities By The Oppressors

urdu transliteration text: Mujhko Sine Pe Tum Sulado Baba
english translation text: Make Me Sleep On Your Chest Father

urdu transliteration text:
MERE BABA MUJHE SADA DO HO KAHAAN BABA
CHIN GAYE MERE GOHAR JAL GAYA DAMAN MERA
english translation text:
Oh Father Call Out To Me Where Are You
They Snatched My Earrings And Burt My Dress

urdu transliteration text: NAAM LEKAR MUJHE PUKARO HO KAHAN BABA
english translation text: Take My Name And Call Out To Me Father

urdu transliteration text:
Aag Khaimon Me Lagata Hai Shaqi Kehta Huwa
Looton Asbaab Sabhi Dasht Me Ye Shor Utha
english translation text:
The Oppressor Is Burning The Tent Saying,
Loot All The Wealth, There Was An Uproar In The Desert

urdu transliteration text: Koi Sunta Hi Nahin Dasht Me Ab Meri Sada
english translation text: Nobody Is Hearing My Plea In This Desert

urdu transliteration text:
MAA KI CHADAR KO HAAN BACHALO HO KAHAN BABA
COME AND SAVE MY MOTHER’S CAHDAR OH FATHER

Baad Tere To Sakina Ne Tamache Khaye
Mujhko Awaaz To Do Beti Teri Ghabraye
english translation text:
After You Sakina Was Slapped
Please Call Out For Me, Your Child Is Frightened

urdu transliteration text: Tere Janay Ka Who Manzar Mujhe Ab Tarpaye
english translation text: The Scene Of Your Leaving Is Troubling Me

urdu transliteration text: MUJH KO TABEER – E GHAM BATADO HO KAHAN BABA
english translation text: SHOW ME THE MEANING OF MOURNING, FATHER

urdu transliteration text:
May Nay Pardes May Baba Ye Ghareebi Dekhi
Gham Tera Dekha Sakina Nay Yateemi Dekhi
english translation text:
Away From Home I Have Felt Like A Stranger
After Your State, Sakina Has Become An Orphan

urdu transliteration text: Khoon May Doobi Huwi Dasht Ki Matti Dekhi
english translation text: I Have Seen The Desert Sand Drenched In Blood

urdu transliteration text: APNAY SEENAY PAY TUM SULADO HO KAHAN BABA
english translation text: MAKE ME SLEEP ON YOUR CHEST FATHER

urdu transliteration text:
May Teri Jaan Thi Iss Jaan May Ab Jaan Kahan
Aise Ujri Ho Ke Ab Mere Wo Armaan Kahan
english translation text:
I Was Your Life But Now This Life Has No Meaning
I’m Destroyed To An Extent That I Have No Desires

urdu transliteration text: MERE ABBAS CHACHA MERE NIGEHBAAN KAHAN
english translation text: WHERE IS MY UNCLE ABBAS, WHERE IS MY PROTECTOR?

urdu transliteration text: ALQAMA SAY UNHAIN BULADO HO KAHAN BABA
english translation text: CALL HIM FROM THE ALQAMA, WHERE ARE YOU FATHER?

urdu transliteration text:
Baba Asghar Ki Bina Kaise Jiyungi Tanha
So Gaya Dasht Me Baba Mera Ashgar Pyasa
english translation text:
Father How Will I Live Alone Without Asghar?
He Sleeps On The Desert, Thirsty

urdu transliteration text:
Me Tarasti Hun Mere Dil Me Hai Kohraam Bapa
Wo Kahan Hai Hujhe Bata Do Ho Kahan Baba
english translation text:
I Am Searching And My Heart Is Trembling
Tell Me Father Where Is He?

urdu transliteration text:
Iss Andherey May Tujhe Kaisey Me Dhundoon Baba
Khun Bhara Kurta Tujhe Kaisey Dikhawoon Baba
english translation text:
Father How Shall I Find You In This Darkness?
Father How Do I Show You My Dress Full Of Blood?

urdu transliteration text:
Neel Rukhsaar Ka Ab Kaisay Chhupawoon Baba
Kissay Puchhuun Pata Batado Ho Kahan Baba
english translation text:
Father How Can I Hide The Marks On My Cheeks?
Father, Who Shall I Ask Where To Find You?

urdu transliteration text:
Sun Kay Masoom Sakina Ki Sadayein Yawar
Laash Shabbir Ki Tarpi Hai Ilayya Kehkar
Hearing Sakina’s Cries, “Yawar”
The Body Of Hussain Trembled Calling Out “Ilayya”

AJA LORI BHI SUNAYEGA TUJHEY TERA PIDAR
PHIR NA KEHNA MUJHAY SADA DO HO KAHAN BABA
english translation text:
COME YOU FATHER WILL SING A LULLABY TO YOU
AFTER THAT DO NOT SAY CALL OUT TO ME FATHER
